title: Hardware Cost Performance Planning
conflict_rule: Prefer canonical lane files over raw source payloads unless the user asks for provenance/history. For volatile claims, verify online before presenting as current.

source_hardening_v1_7.critical_answer_gate: Use about 2.7x for TPU 8t price/performance unless another official source is pinned; do not state electricity alone is 30-50% of inference TCO as hard fact.
